title: porphyrocoma pohliana
intro: Porphyrocoma pohliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the 'Rock Daisy'. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Porphyrocoma pohliana include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, often used to treat various health conditions, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
